description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Temporary Service Adjustment of Park Island Ferry Services
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 珀麗灣客運渡輪服務臨時調整

2026-06-21T20:00:00.CONTENT_EN: The following ferry services are temporarily adjusted on 22 June 2026: Park Island Transport Company Limited 'Ma Wan - Central' Route: - Ma Wan to Central: Sailings departing at 5:00 p.m. and 7:30 p.m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S) - Central to Ma Wan: Sailings departing at 5:30 p.m. and 8:00 p.m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S) 'Ma Wan - Tsuen Wan' Route: - Ma Wan to Tsuen Wan: Sailing at 8:10 a.m. is cancelled - Tsuen Wan to Ma Wan: Sailing at 8:30 a.m. is cancelled
2026-06-21T20:00:00.CONTENT_CN: 以下渡輪服務於2026年6⽉22⽇作出臨時調整： 珀麗灣客運有限公司 「⾺灣-中環」航線： -⾺灣⾄中環：下午5時及下午7時30分開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運 -中環⾄⾺灣：下午5時30分及下午8時開出的班次由巴⼠服務(路線NR338S)代替營運 「⾺灣-荃灣」航線： -⾺灣⾄荃灣：取消上午8時10分開出的班次 -荃灣⾄⾺灣：取消上午8時30分開出的班次

2026-06-22T21:33:00.CONTENT_EN:
The following ferry services are temporarily adjusted on 23 June 2026:
Park Island Transport Company Limited
'Ma Wan - Central' Route:
- Ma Wan to Central: Sailings departing at 5:00 p.m. and 7:30 p.m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S)
- Central to Ma Wan: Sailings departing at 5:30 p.m. and 8:00 p.m. are replaced by bus services (Route NR338S)

'Ma Wan - Tsuen Wan' Route:
- Ma Wan to Tsuen Wan: Sailing at 8:10 a.m. is cancelled
- Tsuen Wan to Ma Wan: Sailing at 8:30 a.m. is cancelled.

2026-07-11T15:15:00.CONTENT_EN: As informed by the Chinese Mainland Railway Authorities, the following High Speed Rail train trips will be cancelled due to adverse weather conditions: 11 July： From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Shanghai Hongqiao Station：G900, G902 From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Fuzhou Station：G920, G924 From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Guangzhounan Station ：G6504 From Shanghai Hongqiao Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station：G899, G901 From Fuzhou Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station：G919, G923 From Guangzhounan Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station：G6503 12 July： From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Shanghai Hongqiao Station：G900, G902, G386 From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Fuzhou Station：G920 From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Guangzhounan Station ：G6504 From Shanghai Hongqiao Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station：G899, G901, G385 From Fuzhou Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station：G919 From Guangzhounan Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station：G6503 For the latest train schedules, please refer to the official website (12306.cn). You may also check the latest service updates on the HSR website, mobile app or see the information available at Hong Kong West Kowloon Station. For ticket refunds, please refer to the information on the High Speed Rail website and process within the stated time. To obtain a refund, please use the 12306 official website (12306.cn) or mobile app. Unless you require assistance, there is no need to go to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station.
2026-07-11T15:15:00.CONTENT_CN: 中國內地鐵路單位通報，由於天氣情況惡劣，下列高速鐵路列車車次取消： 7月11日： 由香港西九龍站前往上海虹橋站：G900,G902 由香港西九龍站前往福州站：G920,G924 由香港西九龍站前往廣州南站：G6504 由上海虹橋站前往香港西九龍站：G899,G901 由福州站前往香港西九龍站：G919,G923 由廣州南站前往香港西九龍站：G6503 7月12日： 由香港西九龍站前往上海虹橋站：G900,G902,G386 由香港西九龍站前往福州站：G920 由香港西九龍站前往廣州南站：G6504 由上海虹橋站前往香港西九龍站：G899,G901,G385 由福州站前往香港西九龍站：G919 由廣州南站前往香港西九龍站：G6503 有關車次的資料，請留意12306官方網站(12306.cn)，如已安裝手機應用程式，可按「車站大屏」頁面。您亦可留意於高速鐵路網頁、手機應用程式或香港西九龍站發放的最新資訊。 如需退票，請參閱高速鐵路網頁並於指定日期內辦理。請盡量使用12306官方網站(12306.cn)或手機應用程式，不用急於到香港西九龍站辦理。

2026-07-12T15:55:00.CONTENT_EN: As informed by the Chinese Mainland Railway Authorities, the following High Speed Rail (HSR) train trips will be cancelled due to adverse weather conditions: 12 July: From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Shanghai Hongqiao Station*: G902, G386 From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Fuzhou Station: G920 From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Guangzhounan Station: G6504 From Shanghai Hongqiao Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station*: G901, G385 From Fuzhou Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station: G919 From Guangzhounan Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station: G6503 *Train trip G899, G900 resumes For the latest train schedules, please refer to the official website (12306.cn) or the mobile app. You may also check the latest service updates on the HSR website, mobile app or see the information available at Hong Kong West Kowloon Station. For ticket refunds, please refer to the information on the High Speed Rail website and process within the stated time. To obtain a refund, please use the 12306 official website (12306.cn) or mobile app. Unless you require assistance, there is no need to go to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station.
2026-07-12T15:55:00.CONTENT_CN: 中國內地鐵路單位通報，由於天氣情況惡劣，下列高速鐵路列車車次取消： 7月12日： 由香港西九龍站前往上海虹橋站*：G902,G386 由香港西九龍站前往福州站：G920 由香港西九龍站前往廣州南站：G6504 由上海虹橋站前往香港西九龍站*：G901,G385 由福州站前往香港西九龍站：G919 由廣州南站前往香港西九龍站：G6503 *G899,G900恢復行駛 有關車次的資料，請留意12306官方網站(12306.cn)，如已安裝手機應用程式，可按「車站大屏」頁面。您亦可留意於高速鐵路網頁、手機應用程式或香港西九龍站發放的最新資訊。 如需退票，請參閱高速鐵路網頁並於指定日期內辦理。請盡量使用12306官方網站(12306.cn)或手機應用程式，不用急於到香港西九龍站辦理。

2026-07-14T14:55:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to strong wind condition, the following special traffic and transport arrangements have been implemented on Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge Hong Kong Link Road (HZMB HKLR), with details as shown below:

The speed limit of the HZMB HKLR is lowered from 100 km/h to 50 km/h.
.
2026-07-14T14:55:00.CONTENT_CN:
由於強風關係，港珠澳大橋香港連接路已實施以下特別交通及運輸安排：

港珠澳大橋香港連接路的最高車速限制由每小時100 公里降低至每小時50 公里。
。
